name: Vinegar and Cleaning Your Oven
recipeInstructions:
1. One of the most unpleasant cleaning tasks is getting rid of the grease and grime that builds up inside your oven. Make a paste of 1 cup vinegar and 1/4 cup powdered laundry detergent. Heat your oven for 5 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit, then turn off. Spread the paste around the oven, applying it more heavily to very greasy areas. Leave the paste on for an hour, then use a plastic spatula to gently scrape the dirt away.
2. To prevent grease and grimy buildup in your oven from happening in the first place, dip a sponge in full-strength vinegar and wipe down all sides of the oven.
3. If you've already used a commercial oven cleaner to tackle your oven, you can remove the smelly residue by spraying the surfaces with a mixture of equal parts vinegar and water. Wipe dry with a clean cloth.
